title: NLP-010-how-does-naive-bayes-classifier-work-in-nlp原理与应用
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-010 How does Naive Bayes classifier work in NLP?

 10. How does Naive Bayes classifier work in NLP?
答案要点:
- 原理: 基于贝叶斯定理，假设特征独立
- 公式: P(C|X) = P(X|C) × P(C) / P(X)
- 变体:
  - Multinomial NB (文本分类)
  - Bernoulli NB (二元特征)
  - Gaussian NB (连续特征)
- 优势: 快速、适合高维数据、小样本表现好
- 应用: Spam Detection, Sentiment Analysis, Document Classification

质量评分: 90/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---

Category: NLP...
